title: Unique Hearty Ethiopian Lamb Stew
description: A fatty and fluffy Ethiopian dish featuring rigatoni, slow-cooked to perfection with Mediterranean-friendly flavors, providing an energizing meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it starts to soften, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the berbere spice and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth, salt, and black pepper, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 2 1/2 hours.
Add the rigatoni to the pot and continue to simmer, covered, for 30 minutes, or until the pasta is tender.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
